style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Centre-left: a SERVER box containing a smaller box STREAM MANAGER showing userId then an arrow to a set of two connections TAB 1 and TAB 2. An arrow labelled event: notification pushes right to two BROWSER TAB boxes. Below, a separate box GET /notifications LIST marked with a rust tag SOURCE OF TRUTH connects to the tabs. Small captions ONE-WAY STREAM, AUTO-RECONNECT, BEST-EFFORT. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Centre-left: a SERVER box containing a smaller box STREAM MANAGER showing userId then an arrow to a set of two connections TAB 1 and TAB 2. An arrow labelled event: notification pushes right to two BROWSER TAB boxes. Below, a separate box GET /notifications LIST marked with a rust tag SOURCE OF TRUTH connects to the tabs. Small captions ONE-WAY STREAM, AUTO-RECONNECT, BEST-EFFORT. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
